title: GENYOUth Announces Opening of Coach of the Year Award Nominations
text: For the Second Year, GENYOUth’s NFL FLAG-In-Schools Coach of the Year Award Will Honor Physical Education Teachers and Coaches Who Empower Students and Unite Communities NEW YORK, Sept. 29, 2022 /PRNewswire/ — GENYOUth and NFL FLAG-In-Schools (FIS) are accepting nominations for the 2022-23 NFL FLAG-In-Schools Coach of the Year Award program, made possible by the NFL […]...

title: Fidelity National's (FIS) New Platform to Better Serve SMBs
text: Fidelity National (FIS) unveils Worldpay for Platforms to let software companies extend an integrated payments platform to SMBs, backed by FIS' payment support to the small-time and mid-sized business units.

title: FIS Unveils Worldpay for Platforms, Enabling Software Providers to Transform SMB Commerce Experiences
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Financial technology leader FIS® (NYSE: FIS) announced today that it is revolutionizing the way small-to-medium-sized businesses (SMBs) gain access to embedded payments and finance solutions through software providers with the launch of Worldpay for Platforms™. This new software-as-a-service (SaaS) solution combines the power of the global merchant and banking capabilities of FIS with embedded payments technology built on the platform brought to the company

title: FIS Ranks First in 2022 IDC FinTech Rankings
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Financial technology leader FIS® (NYSE: FIS) announced today that it has ranked first in the 2022 IDC FinTech Rankings. The ranking features the top 100 global providers of financial technology based on prior-year revenue. FIS has been first in the IDC FinTech rankings for nine of the past 12 years. “FIS has once again reclaimed its status as the largest FinTech based on our latest research,” said Marc DeCastro, research director, IDC Financial Insights. “As

title: 2 Dividend Stocks in the Competitive Financial Transaction Space
text: Financial transaction stocks are investing heavily to stay ahead of the competition and provide diversified payment solutions. Fidelity National (FIS) and Western Union (WU) are high-quality dividend stocks that can fetch you promising returns.

title: 5 Financial Transaction Stocks to Watch Amid Tech Investments
text: The growing uptake of touchless payments and a solid M&A strategy might drive the Financial Transaction Services space. However, high technology investments will dampen margins.

title: Fidelity National Information Services: A Cheap Fintech Play But A Bearish Chart
text: Macro headwinds are numerous, dinging corporate profitability. Fintech firms have been taken to the woodshed, but one established player is not a strong value stock.
